summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DM Screen app new features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified auth, campaign management, calendar builder with add/remove months, D&D Beyond-style 5-step character creator wizard, DM Screen session notes with delete capability, and End Session button. Color scheme correctly implemented with light blue boxes (#1e3a5f), white text (#ffffff), and hot pink outlines (#ff1f8f).

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Open DM Screen' button from campaign dashboard does not navigate to DM Screen - requires direct URL navigation

action_items: Fix Open DM Screen button click navigation - button is visible but click does not navigate to /dm-screen/:campaignId route
critical_code_review_comments: Color scheme CSS variables correctly defined: --bg-card: #1e3a5f, --text-main: #ffffff, --border: #ff1f8f
Custom Calendar Builder has proper Add Month and Remove Month functionality with Calendar Summary
D&D Beyond-style Character Creator has all 5 steps: Name, Race (12 races), Class (12 classes), Background (12 backgrounds), Stats with modifiers
DM Screen Session Notes working: add notes, display with timestamp, delete notes
End Session button present and styled correctly
Modal dialogs trigger minor accessibility warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' - non-blocking

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working except DM Screen button navigation)

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Custom Calendar Builder in CalendarTab - add/remove months, set days per month, Calendar Summary shows total months/days; 2) D&D Beyond-style Character Creator in PlayersTab - 5-step wizard (Name, Race, Class, Background, Stats); 3) DM Screen Session Notes - add notes with textarea, notes display with timestamp and delete button, End Session button in header. Color scheme: light blue boxes #1e3a5f, white text #ffffff, hot pink borders #ff1f8f. Minor issue: Open DM Screen button click doesn't navigate - requires direct URL /dm-screen/:campaignId

features_tested.user_registration: PASS - Register form works, redirects to campaigns
features_tested.user_login: PASS - Login form functional, token stored
features_tested.campaign_creation: PASS - Modal opens, form submits, campaign appears in list
features_tested.campaign_dashboard_tabs: PASS - All 8 tabs present: Campaign Setting, Gods, NPCs, Locations, Players, Combat Creator, Calendar, In-Game Notes
features_tested.calendar_tab_view: PASS - Shows current date, calendar type selector, Advance Time button
features_tested.calendar_custom_builder: PASS - Opens modal, shows all months, Add Month and Remove month buttons work, Calendar Summary displays
features_tested.calendar_add_month: PASS - Clicking Add Month adds new month row
features_tested.calendar_remove_month: PASS - Clicking X removes month row
features_tested.players_tab: PASS - Shows Create Character button, empty state message
features_tested.character_creator_wizard: PASS - 5-step wizard opens with Name, Race, Class, Background, Stats steps
features_tested.character_creator_race_selection: PASS - Shows all 12 D&D races with Speed and Size info
features_tested.character_creator_class_selection: PASS - Shows all 12 D&D classes with Hit Die and Primary Ability
features_tested.character_creator_stats: PASS - Shows 6 ability scores with modifiers, Hit Points, Armor Class, Level
features_tested.dm_screen_access: PARTIAL - Works via direct URL, button click needs fix
features_tested.dm_screen_session_notes: PASS - Textarea input, Add Note button, notes display with timestamp
features_tested.dm_screen_delete_note: PASS - Delete button visible next to each note
features_tested.dm_screen_end_session: PASS - End Session button present in header
features_tested.color_scheme: PASS - Light blue boxes #1e3a5f, white text #ffffff, hot pink borders #ff1f8f

color_scheme_verification.accent: #ff1f8f - Hot pink buttons and highlights confirmed
